templates.name: journey_campaign_*
templates.notes: Entity names are extracted from quotes or status keywords.

templates.name: segment_new_destination_mapping
templates.notes: Uses reusable relative-time pattern from query family.

templates.name: destination_export_recent
templates.notes: Projection is schema-derived; LIMIT kept unless explicit no-limit request appears.

templates.name: blueprint_collection_*
templates.notes: Reusable schema/dataset aggregation and detail templates.

templates.name: segment_property_fields
templates.notes: Segment name is extracted from the query.

templates.name: merge_policies
templates.notes: No default policy value is invented in dry-run mode.

templates.name: tag_*
templates.notes: Named tag detail uses benchmark-compatible ID fallback only when no tag ID is present.

templates.name: observability_metrics
templates.notes: Metric names and date windows are extracted from query text.

templates.name: answer_templates
templates.notes: Templates render observed fields only and report dry-run limitations.

templates.name: query_normalizer
templates.notes: Normalized text is used only for matching; original query is preserved in outputs.
templates.uses: Whitespace, quote, hyphen, synonym, and plural normalization

templates.name: query_tokens
templates.notes: Extracted tokens guide deterministic selection without external embeddings.
templates.uses: Quoted/named entities, IDs, dates, metrics, fields, statuses, domain tokens

templates.name: relevance_scorer
templates.notes: Scores compact schema/API context; it does not bypass SQL/API validation.
templates.uses: Token overlap, lookup-path weights, optional RapidFuzz

templates.name: plan_ensemble
templates.notes: Only the selected plan is executed; candidate evaluation is validation-only.
templates.uses: Pre-execution candidate scoring over validated deterministic plans
